snapshot.active_constraints: C++17 standard, Ninja/LLVM pipeline, PowerShell syntax lock.
snapshot.key_knowledge: Verified minimal C++17 build environment with OrchestratorTest. Build toolchain injected into shell PATH.
snapshot.artifact_trail: - include/: core headers - src/: main.cpp, sketch.cpp - build/: active Ninja build directory - build_env_config.json: toolchain configuration - executor_report.json: status report - executor_console.log: transcript
